---
title: "Georgia Blood Lead Levels Dashboard"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: scroll
runtime: shiny
resource_files:
- data/2013.xlsx
- data/2014.xlsx
- data/2015.xlsx
- data/2016.xlsx
- data/2017.xlsx
- data/2018.xlsx
- data/2019.xlsx
- data/2020.xlsx
- data/2021.xlsx
- data/2022.xlsx
- data/2023.xlsx
- data/2024.xlsx
- data/2022.xlsx
- data/2021.xlsx
- data/2020.xlsx
- data/2019.xlsx
- data/2018.xlsx
- data/2017.xlsx
- data/2016.xlsx
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ------------------------------
# Step 1: Load Required Libraries
# ------------------------------
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
library(sf)           # Spatial data
library(leaflet)      # Interactive maps
library(dplyr)        # Data manipulation
library(readxl)       # Read Excel files
library(janitor)      # Clean column names
library(tidycensus)   # Get Census data
library(stringr)      # String manipulation
library(purrr)        # Functional programming
library(tigris)       # Get shapefiles
library(rsconnect)

# Suppress warnings
options(warn = -1)

# ------------------------------
# Step 2: Set Paths
# ------------------------------
excel_folder <- "data"

# ------------------------------
# Step 3: Define Function to Get Census Data
# ------------------------------
get_children_under6 <- function(year) {
  get_acs(
    geography = "county",
    state = "GA",
    variables = c(
      male_under5 = "B01001_003",
      male_5years = "B01001_004",
      female_under5 = "B01001_027",
      female_5years = "B01001_028"
    ),
    year = year,
    survey = "acs5",
    output = "wide"
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      total_under6 = male_under5E + male_5yearsE + female_under5E + female_5yearsE,
      year = year,
      county_name = toupper(str_remove(NAME, " County, Georgia"))
    ) %>%
    select(GEOID, county_name, total_under6, year)
}

# ------------------------------
# Step 4: Pull Census Data for Years 2013-2022 Only
# ------------------------------
census_data <- map_df(2013:2022, possibly(get_children_under6, otherwise = NULL))

# ------------------------------
# Step 5: Load Georgia County Shapefiles
# ------------------------------
ga_counties <- counties(state = "GA", cb = TRUE, year = 2022, class = "sf") %>%
  mutate(NAME = toupper(trimws(NAME)))

# ------------------------------
# Step 6: Load All Excel Files (2013-2022 only)
# ------------------------------
excel_files <- list.files(
  excel_folder,
  pattern = "^[^~].*\\.xlsx$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# Filter to only include years 2013-2022
excel_files <- excel_files[grepl("201[3-9]|202[0-2]", excel_files)]

# ------------------------------
# Step 7: Process Each Excel File
# ------------------------------
process_excel_file <- function(file) {
  year <- as.numeric(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)))
  
  if(year < 2013 || year > 2022) return(NULL)
  
  threshold <- ifelse(year >= 2021, 3.5, 5)
  
  data <- read_excel(file, sheet = "Data") %>%
    select(1:4) %>%
    clean_names() %>%
    mutate(
      county = toupper(trimws(county)),
      county = gsub(" COUNTY$", "", county),
      year = year,
      threshold = threshold
    )
  
  if("perc_children_5" %in% names(data)) {
    data <- data %>% rename(perc_screened_elevated = perc_children_5)
  } else if("perc_children_3_5" %in% names(data)) {
    data <- data %>% rename(perc_screened_elevated = perc_children_3_5)
  }
  
  data <- data %>%
    select(county, year, threshold, total_children_screened, perc_screened_elevated)
  
  return(data)
}

all_screening_data <- map_df(excel_files, process_excel_file)

# Safety check before filtering
if(nrow(all_screening_data) > 0 && "county" %in% names(all_screening_data)) {
  all_screening_data <- all_screening_data %>% filter(!is.na(county))
}
  

# ------------------------------
# Step 8: Merge Census Data with Screening Data & Calculate Metrics
# ------------------------------
final_data <- all_screening_data %>%
  left_join(census_data, by = c("county" = "county_name", "year" = "year")) %>%
  mutate(
    perc_screened_elevated = as.numeric(perc_screened_elevated),
    num_elevated_BLL = total_children_screened * perc_screened_elevated,
    screening_rate = (total_children_screened / total_under6) * 100,
    prevalence = perc_screened_elevated * 100   # % of screened children elevated
  )
```

Filters {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
selectInput("selected_year",
            label = "Choose Year:",
            choices = 2013:2022,
            selected = 2022)

selectInput("selected_metric",
            label = "Choose Metric:",
            choices = c("Prevalence", "Screening Rate"),
            selected = "Prevalence")
```

---

**Dashboard Information:**

This dashboard displays blood lead level data for Georgia counties from 2013-2022.

**Metrics Shown:**

- **Screening Rate:** % of population under 6 who were tested.

- **Prevalence:** % of children under 6 screened with elevated blood lead levels.

**BLL Thresholds:**

* 2013-2020: ≥5 µg/dL
* 2021-2022: ≥3.5 µg/dL

Column
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### County Map
```{r}
output$county_map <- renderLeaflet({
  
  year_selected <- as.numeric(input$selected_year)
  metric_selected <- input$selected_metric
  
  req(year_selected, metric_selected, final_data, ga_counties)
  
  year_data <- final_data %>%
    filter(year == year_selected)
  
  req(nrow(year_data) > 0)
  
  map_data <- ga_counties %>%
    left_join(year_data, by = c("NAME" = "county"))
  
  # ------------------------------
  # Select metric dynamically
  # ------------------------------
  if(metric_selected == "Prevalence") {
    map_values <- map_data$prevalence
    legend_title <- "Prevalence (%)"
    domain_min <- 0
    domain_max <- 35
  } else {
    map_values <- map_data$screening_rate
    legend_title <- "Screening Rate (%)"
    domain_min <- 0
    domain_max <- 30
  }
  
  # Color palette
  pal <- colorNumeric(
    palette = c("#E6D5F5", "#C9A5E8", "#9D5BD2", "#7B2CBF", "#5A189A", "#3C096C"),
    domain = c(domain_min, domain_max),
    na.color = "lightgrey"
  )
  
  # Hover labels (no race, no true prevalence)
  labels <- sprintf(
    "<strong>%s County</strong><br/>
    Population Under 6: %s<br/>
    Total Tested: %s<br/>
    Screening Rate: %s%%<br/>
    Children with Elevated BLL: %s<br/>
    Prevalence: %s%%",
    map_data$NAME,
    ifelse(is.na(map_data$total_under6), "N/A", format(map_data$total_under6, big.mark = ",")),
    ifelse(is.na(map_data$total_children_screened), "N/A", format(map_data$total_children_screened, big.mark = ",")),
    ifelse(is.na(map_data$screening_rate), "N/A", round(map_data$screening_rate, 2)),
    ifelse(is.na(map_data$num_elevated_BLL), "N/A", round(map_data$num_elevated_BLL, 0)),
    ifelse(is.na(map_data$prevalence), "N/A", round(map_data$prevalence, 2))
  ) %>% lapply(htmltools::HTML)
  
  # Render Leaflet
  leaflet(map_data) %>%
    addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
    addPolygons(
      fillColor = ~pal(map_values),
      weight = 1,
      opacity = 1,
      color = "white",
      fillOpacity = 0.7,
      highlightOptions = highlightOptions(
        weight = 3, color = "#666",
        fillOpacity = 0.9,
        bringToFront = TRUE
      ),
      label = labels,
      labelOptions = labelOptions(
        style = list("font-weight" = "normal", padding = "3px 8px"),
        textsize = "13px",
        direction = "auto"
      )
    ) %>%
    addLegend(
      pal = pal,
      values = c(domain_min, domain_max),
      opacity = 0.7,
      title = legend_title,
      position = "bottomright", 
      labFormat = labelFormat(suffix = "%") 
    )
})

leafletOutput("county_map", height = "800px")
```
